name: hubcli
description: A unified CLI shell powered by Node.js and Python workers.

scripts.test:help: node ./bin/hubcli.js --help && node ./bin/hubcli.js xmind --help && node ./bin/hubcli.js md --help && node ./bin/hubcli.js doctor --help && node ./bin/hubcli.js arthas --help && node ./bin/hubcli.js rabbitmq --help && node ./bin/hubcli.js rabbitmq queue --help && node ./bin/hubcli.js rocketmq4 --help && node ./bin/hubcli.js rocketmq4 topic --help && node ./bin/hubcli.js rocketmq4 message --help && node ./bin/hubcli.js mqtt --help && node ./bin/hubcli.js mqtt publish --help && node ./bin/hubcli.js mqtt subscribe --help && node ./bin/hubcli.js mqtt session --help && node ./bin/hubcli.js mqtt retained --help && node ./bin/hubcli.js minio --help && node ./bin/hubcli.js minio bucket --help && node ./bin/hubcli.js minio object --help && node ./bin/hubcli.js nacos --help && node ./bin/hubcli.js nacos namespace --help && node ./bin/hubcli.js nacos config --help && node ./bin/hubcli.js mysql --help && node ./bin/hubcli.js mysql database --help && node ./bin/hubcli.js mysql query --help
